name: workflow recovery via audit log replays transitions to reconstruct the latest state
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro compliance && printf '{"event":"workflow-transition","from":null,"to":"plan","at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"}\n{"event":"workflow-transition","from":"plan","to":"build","at":"2026-05-13T01:00:00Z"}\n' > compliance/audit.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/recover-from-audit.sh" --audit-log compliance/audit.log --out .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"current_state":"build"' .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && echo ok 1>&2
